videos.headline: Oklahoma's Jackson Arnold hits a wide-open Jake Roberts for a TD
videos.description: Jackson Arnold throws it over the middle to Jake Roberts who extends the Sooners' lead over Houston.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oklahoma’s Jackson Arnold hits a wide-open Jake Roberts for a TD) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jackson Arnold connects with Brenen Thompson for a Sooners TD
videos.description: Jackson Arnold hits Brenen Thompson on a slant to give Oklahoma a 7-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jackson Arnold connects with Brenen Thompson for a Sooners TD) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Houston's Donovan Smith goes deep to Joseph Manjack IV for a TD
videos.description: Donovan Smith goes deep to Joseph Manjack IV for a Cougars touchdown to pull Houston closer to Oklahoma.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Houston’s Donovan Smith goes deep to Joseph Manjack IV for a TD) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oklahoma`s defense causes safety on Houston
videos.description: Gracen Halton rushes into the backfield to tackle Stacy Sneed for a safety.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oklahoma`s defense causes safety on Houston) 2024/09/07 ESHEET
